name: Plot Director
description: Watches how you play, builds a deep profile of the story's themes and your preferences, and weaves short plot threads that build on each other -- grounded in established characters, guided by an evolving narrative direction, and quality-checked before they go live. The active thread is visible in the sidebar and via /plot.

plot_enabled.label: Plot Direction
plot_enabled.description: Track the story's direction and your playstyle, and keep one short plot thread active that plays to them. One background LLM call per assessment.

assessment_frequency.label: Assessment Frequency (turns)
assessment_frequency.description: Check thread progress and update the story profile every N turns.

difficulty.label: Challenge Difficulty
difficulty.description: How hard new plot threads push back: 1 = gentle complications, 3 = moderate opposition and real stakes, 5 = brutal opposition with lasting consequences. This is the only difficulty control — it never auto-adapts.

thread_max_turns.label: Thread Lifespan (turns)
thread_max_turns.description: A thread that has not resolved after this many turns expires and is replaced by a new one.

thread_cooldown_turns.label: Quiet Period After a Thread (turns)
thread_cooldown_turns.description: After a thread resolves or expires, wait this many turns before weaving the next one (abandoned threads wait twice as long; 0 restores immediate replacement).

fit_check_enabled.label: Thread Quality Gate
fit_check_enabled.description: Check each generated thread against the story's tone, established facts, and narrative direction before accepting it. One extra cheap LLM call per new thread.

stall_threshold.label: Nudge After (ignored checks)
stall_threshold.description: Number of consecutive checks where the thread saw no engagement before the storyteller gets a gentle piece of connective material in its context.

abandon_after.label: Abandon After (ignored checks)
abandon_after.description: Number of consecutive ignored checks before the thread is abandoned and a different kind of thread is generated.

opportunity_nudges.label: Opportunistic Nudges
opportunity_nudges.description: Also nudge when a scene presents a natural opening for the thread, even before the stall threshold is reached.

command_help./plot: Show the active plot thread, momentum, and your profile. The challenge and the story direction stay spoiler-hidden: '/plot challenge' and '/plot direction' reveal them. '/plot regen' weaves a new thread; '/plot reset confirm' (cheat) wipes ALL plot data and rebuilds the profile, direction, and first thread from the story so far; '/plot suspend' freezes plot direction and '/plot resume' picks it back up; '/plot profile ...' edits your tone/themes/likes/dislikes/avoids/pacing/agency/register/notes.
